works.title: Style is Wild
works.description: An abstract composition based on the hidden structures between graffiti letters, movement and urban rhythm.
works.alt: Hize colorful abstract graffiti artwork on canvas

works.title: Canvas Composition No. 1
works.description: A studio work translating graffiti rhythm, colour and letter construction into a contemporary abstract composition.
works.alt: Hize abstract painting inspired by graffiti letter structures

works.title: Get High
works.description: A canvas work connecting traditional graffiti energy with layered abstract colour fields.
works.alt: Hize abstract graffiti canvas with colorful letter fragments

works.title: Conexion
works.description: A composition built from connections between letter fragments, movement and abstract urban structure.
works.alt: Hize abstract graffiti canvas with pastel color movement

works.title: Conexion No. 3
works.description: A canvas work exploring balance, kinetic gesture and the visual memory of graffiti writing.
works.alt: Hize colorful abstract graffiti artwork on canvas

works.title: Expo Bohemia Negro
works.description: A panoramic studio piece with layered graffiti references, contrast and abstract rhythm.
works.alt: Hize abstract graffiti canvas with black background and colorful shapes

works.title: Osaka Writing
works.description: An international graffiti work from Hize's archive, connected to his broader practice in urban visual culture.
works.alt: Hize graffiti artwork in Osaka with abstract letter structure

works.title: Sharjah Writing
works.description: A graffiti archive piece showing the structural origin of Hize's abstract studio language.
works.alt: Hize graffiti piece in Sharjah with dynamic letter forms

works.title: Bronx Writing
works.description: A graffiti archive work combining pastel wildstyle lettering, character detail and street energy in a large-scale wall composition.
works.alt: Hize Bronx graffiti piece with pastel wildstyle letters and cartoon character

works.title: Barcelona Writing
works.description: A fluorescent graffiti archive piece with sharp lettering, star motifs and character work painted as an urban wall intervention.
works.alt: Hize Barcelona graffiti mural with neon yellow lettering and side character

works.title: Ibiza Writing No. 3
works.description: An Ibiza graffiti archive work balancing angular lettering, bright Mediterranean colour and playful figurative detail.
works.alt: Hize Ibiza graffiti mural with green and orange wildstyle letters

works.title: Ibiza Writing
works.description: A graffiti archive mural with layered turquoise lettering, magenta atmosphere and portrait character work across a long wall.
works.alt: Hize graffiti mural with turquoise lettering and portrait character on a long wall

works.title: Mislata Writing
works.description: A vivid archive graffiti work with hot pink letterforms, electric contrast and figurative side character painted in an urban setting.
works.alt: Hize Mislata graffiti mural with pink lettering and electric background

works.title: Pinar Writing No. 2
works.description: A large-scale graffiti archive piece built through soft highlights, electric colour transitions and expansive wildstyle movement.
works.alt: Hize graffiti piece with yellow and aqua letter forms on a blue wall

works.title: Pinar Writing
works.description: A silver-toned graffiti archive work set against a bright orange and blue bubble background, focusing on clean structure and balance.
works.alt: Hize graffiti mural with silver lettering and orange blue bubble background

works.title: Ibiza Writing No. 2
works.description: An Ibiza archive graffiti piece with pastel blue and pink letter structure, crisp highlights and character-led composition.
works.alt: Hize Ibiza graffiti mural with pastel blue and pink wildstyle letters and red character

works.title: Murcia Writing
works.description: An archive graffiti wall built through sunset colour gradients, sharp wildstyle structure and a skyline-inspired urban backdrop.
works.alt: Hize Murcia graffiti mural with yellow and pink lettering, skyline backdrop and central dragon figure

works.title: Valencia Writing
works.description: An archive graffiti composition balancing pastel letter construction, cartoon figuration and high-contrast wall texture.
works.alt: Hize Valencia graffiti mural with pastel lettering and cartoon character on a dark stone wall

works.title: Beni Writing
works.description: A bright archive wall developed through floating wildstyle geometry, pastel colour blocks and a crisp electric outline.
works.alt: Hize graffiti wall with blue and pink lettering outlined in orange on a bright blue background

works.title: Dubai Writing
works.description: An archive graffiti piece with layered pastel forms, radiant contrast and compact wildstyle structure.
works.alt: Hize Dubai graffiti mural with pink and turquoise lettering on a luminous blue wall

works.title: Ibiza Bus Intervention
works.description: A site-specific archive intervention across abandoned rail cars, combining letter rhythm, layered colour and expansive urban context.
works.alt: Hize graffiti intervention painted across abandoned train cars in Ibiza with pink and turquoise lettering

works.title: Ibiza Suso Writing
works.description: An archive wall pairing saturated blue letterforms, glowing outlines and playful character energy within a high-contrast palette.
works.alt: Hize graffiti mural with blue lettering on a magenta wall and green character detail

works.title: Mislata Writing No. 2
works.description: A graffiti archive wall driven by metallic lettering, atmospheric fire-toned background and a strong sense of street-scale impact.
works.alt: Hize silver graffiti lettering against a fiery black and orange background in Mislata

works.title: Miami Writing
works.description: An archive mural built through warm neon contrast, stretched wildstyle movement and character-led composition.
works.alt: Hize orange and purple graffiti mural with cartoon character and wide horizontal composition in Miami

works.title: Alcoy Writing
works.description: A vivid archive piece where clean colour zones, crisp highlights and compact letter tension create a luminous wall composition.
works.alt: Hize colorful graffiti mural with orange pink and turquoise lettering on a bright wall in Alcoy

works.title: Ibiza Writing No. 4
works.description: An archive Ibiza wall combining saturated gradient lettering, cartoon detail and layered street energy.
works.alt: Hize Ibiza graffiti mural with orange pink and turquoise wildstyle lettering and character on the right

works.title: Ibiza Writing No. 5
works.description: A graffiti archive wall structured through dense blue letterforms, theatrical colour contrast and expressive side character work.
works.alt: Hize Ibiza graffiti mural with blue and purple lettering and wizard character on a red background

works.title: Valencia Jam
works.description: A panoramic archive jam wall bringing together bold lettering, figure work and energetic background atmospherics.
works.alt: Hize Valencia jam wall with panoramic lettering and two characters in a long mural composition

works.title: Graffiti Session 2026
works.description: A recent archive session focused on classic wildstyle structure, acid colour tension and twin character accents.
works.alt: Hize graffiti wall with fluorescent yellow lettering and twin character heads on a purple background

works.title: Torreblanca Mural
works.technique: Acrylic and spray paint on wall
works.description: A large-scale mural translating graffiti roots into colour, movement and architectural presence.
works.alt: Hize mural in Spain combining graffiti and abstract shapes

works.title: Digital Graffiti Session
works.description: A live digital extension of graffiti where movement, gesture and technology become visual expression.
works.alt: Hize VR art performance creating digital graffiti in real time
